top_posts.author: Ada Mazurek
top_posts.title: Pitching in the GCC: What Works Differently | Ada Mazurek posted ...
top_posts.preview: What actually closes deals in the GCC X "We're disrupting the industry"  ✓ "We're partnering with regional leaders" X 10-year hockey stick projections  ✓ 18-month profitability roadmap with conservative growth X Flashy design over substance  ✓ Clean, data-driven decks with regional case studies X "T
top_posts.draft_comment: Ran into this exact GCC pitch gap across 3 ministries in Egypt. Local gatekeepers read "alignment with strategy" as code for relationship and timing, not just content. Your finding tracks with what we've seen: the deck that wins in Europe structures credibility around innovation, while GCC decision-makers want governance clarity first.
